regime_fall.current_status: Day 42 crisis has reached inflection point with US nuclear strikes on Iranian facilities (April 7) followed by ceasefire announcement (April 8) and simultaneous Iranian military response, while Iran's leadership exhibits severe fracture between hardliners rejecting ceasefire and reformists seeking de-escalation, compounded by uncertainty over Mojtaba Khamenei's succession viability and potential leadership vacuum.
regime_fall.last_major_event: US and Iran agreed to two-week ceasefire on April 8, 2026, with Trump postponing further infrastructure strikes for five days, while Iran simultaneously launched cruise missile strikes and rejected formal ceasefire terms, creating contradictory signals indicating internal regime conflict over war continuation versus negotiation.
